label: Health Index: Weighted
info: Combines several sensor health indicators into one weighted 0-100 health score.

name: Weighted machine health score from multiple sensors
info: The function node bundles temperature, vibration, and pressure readings (each with a z-score and anomaly flag, as produced by upstream anomaly detectors) into a single object. The health-index node weights vibration 1.5x against the other sensors and computes a 0-100 health score with healthy/warning/degraded/critical bands. Healthy scores exit output 1; degraded or critical scores exit output 2.

name: bundle 3 sensor states
